# SRC061 - Google Ads Destination Requirements

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | Platform Policy |
| Authors / source | Google |
| Year | Current |
| Source type | Official ad policy |
| Quality | High |
| URL | [https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6368661?hl=en](https://support.google.com/adspolicy/answer/6368661?hl=en) |

## Bias / limitation

Platform policy.

## Core takeaway

Ad destinations must work on common browsers/devices and not return errors to crawlers.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to include landing-page QA before generating launch packets.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template
